chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 1/8: Morning Breakfast
scene: 工作日早上，你在便利店买早餐。（对话链：便利店）

turns.en: Good morning. What can I get you?

turns.cn: 一个三明治和一大杯咖啡。
turns.en: A sandwich and a large coffee, please.

turns.cn: 要加热吗？奶和糖自己加。
turns.en: Want it heated? Cream and sugar are over there.
Yes, please. And a bottle of water.
That'll be nine twenty.
Card, please. Thanks.

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 2/8: Find Batteries
scene: 中午遥控器没电，你顺路进便利店。（对话链：便利店）

turns.cn: 请问有 AA 电池吗？
turns.en: Do you carry double-A batteries?
Behind the register. How many do you need?
One four-pack is fine.
Four ninety-nine. Need a bag?
No thanks.

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 3/8: Heat a Meal
scene: 傍晚你买便当，请店员加热。（对话链：便利店）

turns.cn: 这个鸡肉饭便当，请加热。
turns.en: This chicken rice bowl, please heat it up.

turns.cn: 微波一分钟半，要筷子吗？
turns.en: One and a half minutes in the microwave. Need chopsticks?
Yes, and a can of green tea.

turns.cn: 六块五，在这边吃还是带走？
turns.en: Six fifty. For here or to go?
To go. I'm in a hurry.

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 4/8: ATM Swallowed Card
scene: 店里取款机吞了你的卡。（对话链：便利店）

turns.cn: 你好，取款机把我的卡吞了。
turns.en: Hi, the ATM ate my card.

turns.cn: 机器不是我们管的，要打银行电话。
turns.en: We don't manage that machine. You'll need to call your bank.

turns.cn: 银行电话在机器上有吗？
turns.en: Is the bank's number on the machine?
Yes, it's on the side of the machine.
Could I use your phone to call?
Sure, come to the counter.

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 5/8: Late Night Run
scene: 深夜肚子不舒服，你去便利店买应急用品。（对话链：便利店）

turns.en: Good evening. What do you need?

turns.cn: 胃不舒服，有止疼药和胃药吗？
turns.en: My stomach hurts. Do you have pain relief and antacid?

turns.cn: 止疼药在第三过道，胃药在柜台后。
turns.en: Pain relief is aisle three. Antacid is behind the counter.
Both, please. And a bottle of warm water.
Eleven dollars total.
Card. Thanks.

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 6/8: Pay a Bill
scene: 你在便利店柜台缴电费。（对话链：便利店）

turns.cn: 能代缴电费吗？账单在这。
turns.en: Can I pay my electric bill here? Here's the statement.

turns.cn: 可以，账号和金额确认一下。
turns.en: Sure. Please confirm the account and amount.
Eighty-five sixty, account ending in four three two one.

turns.cn: 加手续费一块五，现金还是卡？
turns.en: Plus a dollar fifty fee. Cash or card?
Card. Receipt, please.
Done. It posts in a day or two.

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 7/8: Wrong Change
scene: 你发现店员找零少了一块，回去说明。（对话链：便利店）

turns.cn: 不好意思，刚才找零好像少了一块。
turns.en: Sorry, I think I was shortchanged by a dollar.

turns.cn: 我查一下小票……您说得对。
turns.en: Let me check the receipt. You're right.
No worries. Must've been busy.
Sorry about that. Here's your dollar.
Thank you.

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

title: Chain 8/8: Regular Customer
scene: 第二天早上，店员认出你是常客。（对话链：便利店）

turns.cn: 还是老样子？大杯咖啡加三明治？
turns.en: The usual? Large coffee and a sandwich?
Yes. No sugar today, please.

turns.cn: 新到的蓝莓马芬，要试试吗？
turns.en: New blueberry muffins. Want to try one?

turns.cn: 来一个吧，昨天谢谢借电话。
turns.en: I'll take one. Thanks again for the phone yesterday.
No problem. Ten fifty total.
Card. See you tomorrow.
